calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Amador CSR: Lois Jones (Department 218)

Appearances:
Attorney, Jak S. Marquez, is present appearing on behalf of Plaintiff, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Natalie Richie, is present.

Defendant, Mohamed Gowad sued as GAWAD, is not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assign from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for a Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Natalie Richie is sworn and examined under direct examination by Jak S. Marquez. The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: 3 Day Notice to PAy Rent or Quit.............................. ID/EV

The Court after hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 145 Taylor Street, Apartment 606, San Francisco, California 94102. The lease agreement is forfeited. Plaintiff shall recover from defendants past due rent in the sum of $995.00, hold over damages in the sum of $1,260.08 and cost in the sum of $195.00 for a total money judgment in the sum of $2,450.08. Attorney's fees are reserved.

Counsel stipulates for the return of the Exhibits. Judgment signed in open court by Commissioner Gargano.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Off Calendar
